original: Ovilium

You pull the egg-shaped cork from the baby blue bottle in your hand. The glowing ivory liquid within quivers slightly with the minute twitches of your hand. You try to get a whiff of the contents’ smell, but find that it has almost none. The only thing your nose catches is the mass produced factory smell of the bottle. You look inside one more time before tipping your head back and imbibing the formula. The taste is just as indescribable as the smell. Not good, but not bad.
